title: androrchis mascula
intro: Androrchis mascula, also known as the Adder's Tongue or Green Adder's Tongue, is a perennial plant species within the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Androrchis mascula include its potential to treat various ailments such as snake bites, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Androrchis mascula is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, which can be used topically or internally, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
